mapper.select: SELECT boss.*, subordinate.subordinate_id FROM boss LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates subordinate ON boss.boss_id = subordinate.boss_id WHERE boss.boss_id = #{bossId}
SELECT boss.*, subordinate.subordinate_id FROM boss LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates subordinate ON boss.boss_id = subordinate.boss_id WHERE boss.employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT b.boss_id, b.employee_id, b.created_at, b.updated_at, e.name, -- Fetched from employee table e.title, -- Fetched from employee table s.subordinate_id FROM boss b LEFT JOIN employee e ON b.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates s ON b.boss_id = s.boss_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boss (employee_id, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{name}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE boss SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE boss_id = #{bossId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM boss_subordinates WHERE boss_id = #{bossId} AND subordinate_id = #{subordinateId}
